## What

Brief description of the changes.

## Why

Why are these changes needed? Link to related issue(s) if applicable.

Closes #

## How

How were the changes implemented? Any notable design decisions?

## Testing

How were the changes tested?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Property tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds without errors (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Format is correct (`pnpm format:check`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] `docker-compose.yml` updated (if adding a server)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
